title: A Picnic in the Lake District
synopsis: A family spends a quiet day beside a lake among green hills in northern England.
sentences: Nina's family drove to the Lake District on a bright summer Saturday.
Green hills rose on every side, and the lake below them looked like glass.
They spread a blanket near the shore under a tall tree.
Nina helped unpack sandwiches, apples, and a large bottle of lemonade.
The air smelled fresh and clean after rain from the night before.
Ducks glided across the water while walkers followed a path along the hillside.
After lunch, Nina skipped stones and counted how many times each one bounced.
Her brother tried too, but most of his stones fell straight into the lake.
Their mother read a book while their father made tea from a small camping stove.
Cloud shadows moved slowly over the hills as the afternoon passed.
When it was time to go home, Nina looked back at the water one last time.
She hoped they would return before the end of summer.
